rationale.fidelity: Correctly maps binary assortment membership, category capacity, uncertain Markov paths, final purchase outcomes, and expected revenue without making transitions controllable.
rationale.managerial_framing: Clearly explains scarce category capacity, substitution through unavailable items, the feasible-set decision, and practical counterconditions.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Properly treats novelty as provisional and bounds the contribution, but supplies no traceable literature.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Labels substitution interpretation as an assumption and disclaims parameter accuracy, prevalence, performance, and realized gains.
rationale.prose_clarity: Technically precise and organized, though somewhat template-heavy and dense.
rationale.overall: An excellent fidelity-preserving explanation of the Markov-chain assortment mechanism.
